sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72945" key="o)lesisialoka/lamos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλεσι-σῐᾰλοκάλᾰμος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[κᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72945.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of spittle-wasting reed,</tr_> epith. of the flute in Pratin.Lyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0647.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.12</biblScope> </bibl> (cj. Bgk. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὁλοσίαλον κάλαμον</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
